titleStmt.title: SII 34.286: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 286. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the north verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Dēvarāya-Mahārāya, Śaka 1373, Prajāpati, Tai 2 = A.D. 1451. December 29.

This is badly worn out; records a gift of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Sīraṅganāthar alias Pallavarāyar, the arasu of Peruṅgōḷiyūr in Teṉ-Panaṅgāḍu-nāḍu to the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. The land was in Teṉ-Kavi-nāḍu, whose nāṭṭār agreed to take upon themselves the tax responsibility and agreed to permit water from the Kavināḍu tank as before.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Irācātirācaṉ IrācaparamEcuraṉ tEvarāyamakārāyar piṟutivirā cciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam [100 3 10 7]3 mEl cellāniṉṟa piṟacaṟpati varuṣam
tai mātam 2 nāḷ Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu vallava nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷam Uṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku jayaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭut teṉpaṉaiṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭup peruṅkōḷi Ūr Aracu
lavaṉ cantikku Amirtu ceyyaviṭṭa tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṭṭa Irācairāca vaḷanāṭṭut teṉka
vināṭṭuk kīḻaivakaivi kum nā ṭākkum vayalukkum kuḷattukkum perunāṉkellai Āvatu kīḻpāṟkellai kuṇṭāṟṟuku mēkkum teṉpāṟkellai Araṇ nīrva
Ūṟkum vayalukkum kuḷattukkum vaṭakkum mēpā kkuḷa muṉkuḷavāyilukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tirunāṅkūrccelvar
tēvatāṉavayalukkum ṟṟukkum teṟku Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilamum Ēttappāṭum kuḷamum kuḷappāṭṭam kuḷavāyt talaikaḷum vayalu
m mēnōkkiyamaramum kīḻnōkkiya kiṇaṟum Āka I l paḷḷiccantam paḻan tēvatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam piṭāri viḷākam nīkki niṉṟa nila ṭaṟṟa mariyātivarum kuḷat
taram veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ pa �kiyum Eccōṟu ta Antarāyam maṟṟum Eṟppēyippaṭṭa Iṟai poṉṉilum puravilum kaḻittu caṟuvamāṉṉiyam Āka naṭakku
mpaṭikkut tirumalaiyil kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭutta nāṉkellaiyi lūrilum tiruccūlat tāpaṉamum paṇṇikkuṭuttōm Āticaṇṭē
cura tēvaṟku cīraṅkanātarāṉa pallavarāyarē Inta taṉ cukantaram peṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Intap puravukku kavi nāṭṭukkuḷattil
paṇṇīrum muṉpavaṟṟa mariyātiyāyk kaṭavitāka Ippaṭikku piḷḷai Aruḷicceyal paṭikku vāṇārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Intakkal veṭṭuppaṭikku
kavināṭṭu nāṭṭavarōm Iṉmariyātikku Ūrukku varum Irācakaram veṭṭi muṭṭi ṭu viṉiyōkam Eṟcōṟu kūṭṭarici An kāṇikkai māni yam Uṇṭāṉa pala
Upātikaḷum nāṅkaḷē poruṭ collak kaṭavatu Ākavum Inta Ūr caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka mutal cantirātiyavaṟ cella nāṅkaḷum kaṭṭa niṉṟak kal veṭṭiṉamaikku ceyaṅkoṇṭa cōḻaṉ
Eḻuttu kulacēkaraviḻupparaiyar Eḻuttu kavināṭṭu vēḷār Eḻuttu vallaṅkoṇṭa vēḷār Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāṭṭār coṟpaṭi
Digital edition of SII 34.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
